testsAdded: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflows-7-9-review-execution.test.tsx — one integration path per workflow 7–9 (review → approve → In Progress) plus FBT scaffold-only and shared Reject contract

redGreenRefactorEvidence.red: Added workflows-7-9-review-execution integration tests and extended reviews/executions unit expectations for prevent_cancellation_8a / prevent_return_8b / prevent_refund_8c before implementations existed.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.green: Extended shared review stages, input defaults, timelines, startExecution, and Approve enablement for workflows 7–9; FBT prevent_return_8b_fbt remains non-executable.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.refactor: Centralized isReviewExecutableWorkflow + workflow-keyed buildReviewInputDefaults; demo-state and recommendation-review use per-workflow defaults.

implementationSummary: Extended apps/demo shared recommendation review and In Progress shells for workflows 7–9 (cancel/return/refund). Each workflow has five-stage prefilled/fillable review, mock execution keys, and FBS timelines with wait/outcome/recovery. Prevent-return FBT intake key stays scaffold-only. Card Reject/Expand/Manual Refresh contract unchanged; Approve enabled for executable keys only. Generalized deriveLifecycleFromTimeline so any last-step succeeded outcome marks completed (not Workflow-1 listed-outcome only).
assumptions: Design Flows numbering 7–9 maps to workflow keys prevent_cancellation_8a, prevent_return_8b, prevent_refund_8c (not create_activity_7a).
FBT return behavior is enforced by non-executable key prevent_return_8b_fbt plus FBS knownLimits/timeline copy, without adding a new recommendation card (preserves stable card order).
risks: Seller decision fields are free-text in Demo review; production would use constrained Approve/Reject controls.
Mutually exclusive approve/reject timeline branches both appear as pending steps in the mock timeline.
